elements.text:
You are at a quiet restaurant with a lot of your family members for dinner. While taking a drink of your water, you accidently drop the glass on the floor and it shatters.

Here are some thoughts that might pop into mind:

texts: I'm sure this isn't the first time this restaurant has had to deal with a brokern glass.
I think about how I will help clean this up.
My clothes are soaking wet, but I can go to the bathroom and dry them off.
The server is annoyed, but they will probably get over that feeling soon.
